message:
Running command: 
# MAJOR MILESTONE! drt-run-0 now has:
# - mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.odb (206MB, created at 04:34!)  
# - mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.drc (0 bytes = 0 DRC violations!)
# 
# DRT-run-0 is COMPLETE! 0 DRC violations!
# Now write_db and write_views will run, then antenna check.
# This should produce the final ODB/DEF/GDS files shortly!

echo "=== DRT-run-0 COMPLETE! $(date) ==="
echo "ODB: 206MB"
echo "DRC: 0 violations"
echo ""

for i in $(seq 1 1000); do
    sleep 10
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] EXITED!" && break

    dd if=/proc/1100961/fd/11 bs=262144 count=256 >> /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null &
    PD=$!; sleep 5; kill $PD 2>/dev/null; wait $PD 2>/dev/null

    CPUTIME=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    PIPEBYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null)
    LATESTMSG=$(tail -5 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-130)
    RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    STEP71=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/" 2>/dev/null | head -5 | tr '\n' ',')
    STEP=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -1)
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] CPU=$CPUTIME PIPE=${PIPEBYTES}B FINAL=$FINAL STEP=$STEP STEP71=[$STEP71] | $LATESTMSG"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
done

function.name: execute_bash
